name: New Potatoes with Peas & Coriander
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dice the potatoes.
2. Heat ghee in a pot until gently hot. Add the potatoes and cumin seeds; cook, stirring, for 2 minutes.
3. Add turmeric, ginger, and red chilies; stir and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Stir in coriander, salt, garam masala, coriander seeds, lemon juice, and water. Simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes, adding more liquid if needed.
5. Just before serving, add the peas. Increase heat to medium-high and cook until all the moisture has evaporated.
